data.title: Iranian Su-24 Bomber Destroyed Minutes Before Planned Attack on U.S. Base
data.description: An Iranian Su-24 bomber was reportedly destroyed just minutes before it was set to attack the largest U.S. military base in the Middle East. According to Jin10, the incident occurred amidst heightened tensions in the region. The destruction of the aircraft prevented a potential escalation of conflict between Iran and the United States. The U.S. military remains on high alert as geopolitical dynamics continue to evolve in the Middle East.

data.title: Optimism to Cease Support for op-geth and op-program by 2026
data.description:
Optimism has announced plans to discontinue support for op-geth and op-program by May 31, 2026. According to BlockBeats, while security patches and critical vulnerability fixes will continue to be released, new feature development, including the upcoming Karst hard fork, will be exclusively conducted on op-reth.

The fault proof program of op-program will be migrated to kona-client, with current deployments expected to remain operational until the Karst hard fork. Chain operators must complete the migration by the time of the Karst hard fork, as chains still running op-geth will be unable to follow the main chain.

Cannon-kona can operate within the existing op-node environment without the need for kona-node, which is an optional component. Node operators are advised to migrate to op-reth promptly to maintain network compatibility and access new feature support.

data.title: Ethereum-Based Network Interstate Secures $1.5 Million Funding
data.description:
Interstate, an Ethereum-based pre-confirmation network, has successfully raised $1.5 million in funding. According to PANews, the investment round saw participation from Marshland Capital, Taisu Ventures, Bloccelerate, Alpen Labs, GD1, MH Ventures, Alchemy Ventures, Legends Group, Waikit Lau, and Sergey Gorbunov.

Interstate is a company focused on cryptocurrency development, aiming to enhance the Ethereum user experience by reducing transaction confirmation times. Their pre-confirmation network allows users to receive transaction confirmations in approximately 100 milliseconds, significantly faster than Ethereum's standard 12-second block time.

data.title: Portugal's Stance on U.S. and Israeli Military Actions Against Iran
data.description: Portugal's Prime Minister Montenegro stated during a parliamentary debate on March 4 that Portugal has not participated in, is not aware of, and does not support the military actions by the United States and Israel against Iran. According to Jin10, Montenegro emphasized Portugal's advocacy for ensuring international peace through diplomatic and negotiation channels.

data.title: Explosion in Tehran Triggers Activation of Air Defense Systems
data.description: An explosion occurred in the northeastern region of Tehran, Iran's capital, at approximately 4:40 AM local time on the 5th. According to Jin10, the incident led to the activation of air defense systems in the area. Details regarding the cause of the explosion and any potential casualties or damage remain unclear at this time. Authorities are investigating the situation to determine the circumstances surrounding the event.

data.title: Meta's Ray-Ban Smart Glasses Under Investigation for Privacy Concerns
data.description: Meta's Ray-Ban smart glasses have come under scrutiny following a joint investigation that revealed the devices recorded sensitive and private moments without user consent. According to NS3.AI, the footage captured by these glasses is utilized by Meta and its subcontractors in Nairobi to train AI systems, raising significant ethical and data protection issues. In response to these concerns, UK regulators have initiated an investigation into Meta to ensure the company's compliance with privacy laws and data transparency standards.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 660 USDT with a 4.48% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 05, 2026, 01:10 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 660 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 660.22998 USDT, with a narrowed 4.48% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: South Korean President Lee Jae-myung Vows Strict Measures Amid Energy Shortage
data.description: South Korean President Lee Jae-myung has announced plans to implement strict measures against those exploiting the current energy shortage situation. According to Jin10, President Lee emphasized the importance of diversifying energy import sources to mitigate the impact of any potential energy crises. The South Korean government is actively seeking to ensure energy security and stability by exploring various avenues for energy imports. This move comes as part of a broader strategy to address the challenges posed by the global energy market fluctuations.

data.title: Oil Prices Rise Amid Middle East Conflict Concerns
data.description: Oil prices increased during the Asian morning session, driven by the potential for prolonged supply disruptions due to Middle East conflicts. According to Jin10, Nikos Tzabouras, a senior market analyst at Tradu.com, noted that the United States has indicated plans for a four to five-week operation, while Iran is attempting to regionalize the conflict. The strategic Strait of Hormuz has effectively been closed. These developments could reverse the previously unfavorable supply-demand dynamics, pushing crude oil prices upward and bringing the $100 per barrel level back into focus.

data.title: Anthropic founder's internal statement: Tensions with Trump stemmed from a lack of donations, while OpenAI did donate.
data.description: Stephanie Palazzolo, a reporter for The Information, posted an image and article on X, stating that she obtained an internal transcript of a speech by Anthropic founder Dario Amodei. Dario stated internally that the tension between Anthropic and the Trump administration stemmed from Anthropic's unwillingness to appease the current administration—"The real reason is that we didn't donate to Trump… We didn't offer dictatorial praise to Trump (while Sam Altman did); we support AI regulation, which contradicts their agenda; we spoke the truth on many AI policy issues (such as job displacement); we truly stood our ground, instead of colluding with them to create a so-called safety show to appease employees." Stephanie suggests that Dario's mention of donations is a veiled reference to OpenAI President Greg Brockman's $25 million donation to Trump.

data.title: Binance Replenishes Bitcoin Learn & Earn Rewards for March 2026
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the Bitcoin Learn & Earn rewards have been replenished for March 2026, allowing eligible new users to earn 0.00001 BTC in token vouchers by completing an optional quiz. The activity period began on 2026-03-01 00:00 (UTC) and will continue until further notice. New users who registered on Binance after this date and successfully complete the quiz with all correct answers can claim the reward. The rewards are available to the first 5,000 new users each month on a first-come, first-served basis.

Participation in the Learn & Earn program is limited to users who registered after 2026-03-01 00:00 (UTC) and have completed the necessary KYC requirements. Each user can participate only once and claim a maximum of one reward. Once all rewards are distributed, participation will close for that month. Rewards will be renewed on the first Thursday of each month, and users are encouraged to stay updated through official announcements. Token voucher rewards will be distributed within 48 hours to qualified learners who pass the quiz, and the validity period for the token voucher is set at 14 days from the day of distribution.

Binance reserves the right to disqualify participants who tamper with program code or interfere with its operation. The platform also retains the right to terminate the activity at any time without prior notice and to interpret the activity's terms. Accounts must be used by the registrants only, and Binance may suspend, freeze, or cancel accounts used by others. The terms and conditions of the promotion are subject to change at Binance's discretion. Users are advised to refer to the original English version for the most accurate information.

data.title: India Seeks Private Startups for Development of Bodyguard Satellites
data.description: India's security agencies are urging private startups to create bodyguard satellites to safeguard the nation's space assets amid rising geopolitical tensions. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the country's accelerated efforts in space defense. This initiative reflects India's growing focus on securing its space infrastructure as global tensions continue to escalate.

data.title: Hong Kong ADRs and Night Futures Show Gains Amid U.S. Stock Market Rise
data.description: Hong Kong's ADRs experienced an increase of 489 points, or 1.94%, reaching 25,738 points, as the U.S. stock market saw an upward trend. According to Ming Pao, the night futures also rose by 402 points, or 1.6%, closing at 25,534 points, with a premium of 285 points. This reflects a positive sentiment in the market, influenced by the performance of U.S. stocks.

data.title: China to Issue Special Bonds to Strengthen Major Banks
data.description: China plans to issue special sovereign bonds to recapitalize several of its largest banks, expanding efforts to bolster the country's $69 trillion financial system amid economic slowdown and market fluctuations. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Beijing's strategy to enhance financial stability as the economy faces challenges. This move is part of broader measures to support the banking sector and ensure resilience against potential financial disruptions. The issuance of these bonds reflects China's commitment to maintaining a robust financial infrastructure in the face of global economic uncertainties.

data.title: Australia's Household Spending Rebounds Amid Economic Uncertainty
data.description: Australia's household spending showed a notable recovery in January, indicating strong consumer demand despite looming economic challenges. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting concerns over potential interest-rate hikes and rising energy costs due to the ongoing Middle East conflict. The rebound in spending suggests that consumers remain active, although the economic outlook remains uncertain with these factors potentially impacting future growth.

data.title: Senate Crypto Tax Reform Advocate Not Seeking Reelection
data.description: Eleanor Terrett posted on X. Another prominent advocate for crypto tax reform in the Senate has announced they will not seek reelection. This decision affects key figures such as Senator Cynthia Lummis and Senator Steve Daines. Additionally, Senator Marsha Blackburn may also be impacted if she is elected as the Governor of Tennessee. The departure of these senators could influence the future of crypto tax legislation in the United States.

data.title: TD Cowen: Trump's CLARITY Act Social Media Post Constructive but Insufficient
data.description: TD Cowen has stated that U.S. President Donald Trump's social media post regarding the CLARITY Act is constructive, according to PANews. However, the post alone is not enough to advance the legislative process. Direct involvement from the President in negotiations between banks and the crypto industry is necessary to break the current deadlock. This is unlikely amid the ongoing armed conflict between the United States and Iran.The legislative process is currently hindered by two major issues: stablecoin yields and conflicts of interest. Despite multiple closed-door meetings at the White House, no compromise has been reached. TD Cowen believes that even if the stablecoin yield issue is resolved, the bill would still need the support of at least 10 Democratic senators. The anticipated deadline for the CLARITY Act is before the start of the August recess.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump's Approval Ratings Show 57% Disapproval
data.description: A recent poll reported by Fox News reveals that 57% of voters disapprove of U.S. President Donald Trump's job performance, while 43% express approval. According to Jin10, these figures highlight the current public sentiment towards the President's administration. The poll reflects ongoing divisions in public opinion as the administration continues to navigate various domestic and international challenges.

data.title: OpenAI Seeks Enhanced Surveillance Support from U.S. Defense Department
data.description: OpenAI is reportedly seeking additional surveillance assurances from the U.S. Department of Defense following its collaboration in artificial intelligence. According to Jin10, this move comes as OpenAI aims to strengthen its security measures and ensure robust oversight in its AI initiatives. The request highlights the growing intersection between AI development and national security concerns, as organizations like OpenAI navigate the complexities of technological advancements and regulatory frameworks. The collaboration with the Department of Defense underscores the importance of aligning AI innovations with governmental standards to address potential risks and enhance operational integrity.
